scripts.build: bash scripts/forge.sh build script/DeployDiamond.s.sol src/IClanWorld.sol src/IClanWorldLens.sol
scripts.codegen: bash scripts/forge.sh build src/IClanWorld.sol src/IClanWorldLens.sol && node ../../scripts/gen-contract-abi.mjs
scripts.check:abi: bash -c 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "jq not installed; cannot check ABI"; exit 1; }; bash scripts/forge.sh build src/IClanWorld.sol src/IClanWorldLens.sol && diff <(jq ".abi" out/IClanWorld.sol/IClanWorld.json) <(jq ".abi" abi/IClanWorld.json) && diff <(jq ".abi" out/IClanWorldLens.sol/IClanWorldLens.json) <(jq ".abi" abi/IClanWorldLens.json)'
scripts.test: pnpm run check:abi && bash scripts/forge.sh test
